_comment: SAMPLE DATA — every entry below is fabricated placeholder content for the demo build, NOT a real customer review. This file mirrors the shape a Google Reviews widget/API response will eventually fill (see the TODO block in index.html and REVIEW-CHECKLIST.md). Delete this file once a real reviews widget is embedded.

reviews.name: Jordan T.
reviews.quote: Showed up on time and my truck looked brand new inside and out. Super convenient.

reviews.name: Sam R.
reviews.quote: They cleaned every window on the house and detailed my car in the same visit. Spotless.

reviews.name: Casey M.
reviews.quote: Booked online, they came to my office parking lot, done before my lunch break ended.

reviews.name: Riley P.
reviews.quote: Storefront glass has never looked better. Easy to schedule, fair price.
